SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement ("Agreement") is made and entered into as of the 15th day of October, 2023, by and between:

1. Dr Tan Wei Ming (NRIC: S2345678D), residing at 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 567890, email: tanwm@fakesgmail.sg, phone: +65 6123 4567;

and

3. Ramasamy Muthu (NRIC: S4567890F), residing at 789 Tampines Street, #03-78, Singapore 345678, email: ramasamy.m@fakesgmail.sg, phone: +65 6345 6789;

Each of the above parties shall be individually referred to as a "Party" and collectively as the "Parties."

WHEREAS, the Parties intend to transfer shares at a purchase price of SGD 1,000,000.

Company: Alpha Beta Pte Ltd, a company incorporated in Singapore (UEN: T12LL3456A), with its registered office at 101 Raffles Place, #10-01, Singapore 048623.
